children.heading: Audits
children.label: a Audits
children.text: For purposes of the Foundation shall be treated as a corporation in part B of subtitle II of title 36.section 10101 of title 36

children.heading: Annual reports
children.label: b Annual reports
children.text: The Foundation shall transmit each year to Congress a report of its proceedings and activities of the previous year, including a full and complete statement of its receipts, expenditures, and investments.
